description:
REQ-031 Phase 3, item 10: Currently workflow phases execute strictly sequentially. Add support for parallel phase execution using a depends_on field for DAG-style concurrency.

Changes needed:
1. Add `depends_on: Option<Vec<String>>` to `PipelinePhaseEntry` in workflow_config.rs — lists phase IDs that must complete before this phase can start
2. Add `ParallelPhaseGroup` concept to lifecycle_executor.rs — phases with all dependencies satisfied can run concurrently
3. Update daemon_phase_pool.rs to spawn multiple phases simultaneously when their depends_on constraints are met
4. Phase completion should trigger re-evaluation of which phases are now unblocked
5. Add DAG validation in validate_workflow_config(): detect cycles, ensure all depends_on targets exist
6. Persist parallel execution state: track which phases are running/completed in the checkpoint
7. Add YAML support: `depends_on: [implementation, testing]` syntax
8. Add tests: two independent phases run in parallel, phase waits for dependency, cycle detection fails validation

Example pipeline:
```yaml
phases:
  - id: research
  - id: implementation
    depends_on: [research]
  - id: testing
    depends_on: [implementation]
  - id: docs
    depends_on: [implementation]  # runs parallel with testing
  - id: review
    depends_on: [testing, docs]   # waits for both
```

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow_config.rs (PipelinePhaseEntry)
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs (phase advancement)
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_phase_pool.rs (phase spawning)
title: Add parallel phase execution with depends_on DAG support
